message:
feat(share): verify-live pipeline with fail-fast, probe refactoring, and deploy robustness

Deploy module:
- Added fail-fast mode to run_verify_live(): when enabled, aborts after
  local stage if any Error-severity check fails, skipping remote and
  security stages for faster feedback loops.
- Extracted helper functions (is_root_derived_remote_check,
  build_probe_check_result, run_single_probe_check) to reduce
  cyclomatic complexity in the main verification pipeline.
- Added SqliteConnection import for persistent verification state
  tracking across deploy sessions.

Probe module:
- Major refactoring of probe check evaluation with clearer separation
  between check definition, execution, and result evaluation.
- evaluate_probe_check() and probe_error_result() extracted as public
  functions to support reuse from deploy module.
- Improved error categorization and timeout handling in probe requests.

Bundle module:
- Enhanced bundle creation with additional validation steps, improved
  manifest generation, and better error messages for malformed assets.

Finalize module:
- Refined post-deploy finalization with additional cleanup steps and
  verification of deployed state.

Planner: Minor adjustment to planning logic.
Lib: Added new public exports for probe evaluation functions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -261,6 +261,8 @@ pub enum ShareError {
     ScopeNoProjects,
     #[error("project identifier not found: {identifier}")]
     ScopeIdentifierNotFound { identifier: String },
+    #[error("validation error: {message}")]
+    Validation { message: String },
     #[error("sqlite error: {message}")]
     Sqlite { message: String },
     #[error("io error: {0}")]
